meta.subtitle: M2C Upgrade — Velocity for Network (VFN) & g2.0 Billing
meta.sowRef: HPSR0548 — Implementation SOW (Cust Version Draft V0.15)
meta.overallNarrative: Program in active build. Configure–Build (WP1) and Integration Rebuild (WP4) progressing. Data Migration trial cycles underway. Key watch items: OOTB validation backlog and product gap dispositions.

pillars.name: Scope
pillars.summary: 11 work packages defined and baselined against SOW. OOTB-first approach holding; customisations controlled via gap register.

pillars.name: Timeline
pillars.summary: Tracking to DM0–DM16 milestone schedule. Build End (PM3, DM6) is the next critical gate. Some design sign-offs trending late.

pillars.name: Quality
pillars.summary: Unit testing evidence captured in Jira. System Test entry criteria being met. Defect management process operational.

workPackages.name: Technical Design Validation – Configure – Build
workPackages.scopeNote: Validate/refine approved M2C & VFN user stories; convert to config/build backlog; configure & build standard + approved customisations; unit test each 3-week sprint.
workPackages.deliverables: Detailed implementation schedule; Build & unit-test evidence in Jira; Configuration details on user stories; Config & code management process docs.

workPackages.name: System Testing
workPackages.scopeNote: Execute System Test of solution components from approved user stories & RTM; log/triage/resolve defects before SI-led integrated testing.
workPackages.deliverables: Updated implementation schedule; System Test progress in Jira; Test Summary Report.

workPackages.name: Velocity & mData21 Data Migration
workPackages.scopeNote: Execute Data Migration Strategy: trial migrations, dry runs, final production migration from Velocity & mData21 into G2/VFN with reconciliation success criteria.
workPackages.deliverables: Data Migration Design Document; per-cycle Migration Reports; Migration Cutover Strategy (draft).

workPackages.name: Integration Rebuild
workPackages.scopeNote: Redevelop, configure & validate all approved integration points per Integration Register & ICDs; promote to SIT.
workPackages.deliverables: Integration build progress in Jira; ICD documents per G2/VFN integration.

workPackages.name: End-to-End Testing Cycles (SIT–E2E–BCT–MT–UAT–PT–Regression)
workPackages.scopeNote: Support SI-led E2E cycles: root-cause on Gentrack-owned components, fixes, retest & regression; daily defect triage.

workPackages.name: Training (Train the Trainer)
workPackages.scopeNote: Classroom-led 2-week Train-the-Trainer on G2 & VFN core functionality and HP workflows; handover materials.
workPackages.deliverables: Train-the-Trainer sessions for TTT leads; Training Materials.

workPackages.name: Production Readiness and Cutover
workPackages.scopeNote: Lead production readiness & cutover per Implementation/Cutover Plan; final migration, technical verification, Go-Live.

workPackages.name: Hypercare Support & Warranty
workPackages.scopeNote: 3-month hypercare: monitor stability, resolve critical/high defects, KT to BAU, post-implementation review.
workPackages.deliverables: Defect progress in Jira; Program Closure Report.

workPackages.name: Inflight Transactions
workPackages.scopeNote: Identify, categorise & define treatment for inflight (open/pending) transactions in legacy systems prior to Go-Live.

workPackages.name: Meter Data Conversion
workPackages.scopeNote: Define & execute Meter Data Conversion Strategy: meter IDs, configs, registers, reads, historical consumption from legacy to G2/VFN.

workPackages.name: Legacy System Decommissioning
workPackages.scopeNote: Read-only transition then full decommission of Velocity & mData21 after stabilisation. No Gentrack deliverables; supports SI.
workPackages.deliverables: No Gentrack deliverables — supports System Integrator with relevant detail.

milestones.name: Build Start
milestones.trigger: Implementation Schedule, Inflight, Config & Code Mgmt
milestones.deliverables: Implementation Schedule; Inflight; Configuration Management & Code Management

milestones.name: Build End
milestones.deliverables: Customisation Solution Design Document; Interface Contract Documents (ICDs)

milestones.name: Trial Migration End
milestones.deliverables: Data Migration Design Document; Migration Report

deliverables.name: Implementation Schedule
deliverables.criteria: MS Project schedule with milestones, deliverables, dependencies

deliverables.name: Inflight
deliverables.criteria: Review/documentation of all inflight customer objects; records in/out of migration + treatment

deliverables.name: Configuration Management & Code Management
deliverables.criteria: How configuration and code are managed

deliverables.name: Customisation Solution Design Document
deliverables.criteria: Solution design per customisation addressing user-story acceptance criteria

deliverables.name: Test Summary Report
deliverables.criteria: Execution details of System Test cases, results & summary

deliverables.name: Data Migration Design Document
deliverables.criteria: Step-by-step migration flow; mapping of source entities/tables/attributes to target

deliverables.name: Migration Cutover Strategy
deliverables.criteria: Execution approach for migrating HP customers & agreed data set

deliverables.name: Training Material
deliverables.criteria: Training material ready for both G2 and VFN

deliverables.name: Implementation Cutover Strategy
deliverables.criteria: Execution approach for rolling G2 & VFN into production

deliverables.name: Deployment Runbook
deliverables.criteria: Hour-by-hour / 30-min block task list for cutover window

deliverables.name: Meter Conversion Strategy
deliverables.criteria: How meter data conversion performed: volumes/batches, duration, approach

deliverables.name: Program Closure Report
deliverables.criteria: Detailed summary of overall program and outcomes

ootb.note: Validate co-design user stories; configure standard rating.
Workflow mapping vs HP as-is in progress.

gaps.description: HP field workflow not fully met by OOTB sequence
Network tariff variant requires configuration extension
Branded statement format beyond standard template

risks.title: Design sign-off slippage
risks.mitigation: Daily design clinics; escalate late approvals to SteerCo.

risks.title: Data quality in legacy (Velocity/mData21)
risks.mitigation: Early trial cycles + cleansing; exclusion list agreed in writing.

risks.title: Integration dependency on SI endpoints
risks.mitigation: Integration Register baselined; joint test windows.

accomplishments: WP1 Configure–Build: completed sprint configuration for core billing user stories.
WP3 Data Migration: trial migration cycle TM1 executed; reconciliation review underway.
WP4 Integration Rebuild: 3 ICDs drafted and circulated for review.
planned: Close out Customisation Solution Design (PM3 / DM6) review comments.
Finalise remaining ICDs and promote validated integrations to test.
blockers: Awaiting HP sign-off on 2 design decisions — at risk of slipping Build End.
Legacy data quality issues in mData21 sample set under investigation.

weeklyLog.summary: Build progressing; design sign-offs trending late. TM1 prepared.
